features.heading: Keyword Rank Tracker
features.description: Track keyword ranks for any product, identify keywords that drive the most organic traffic, and measure the success of SEO efforts.

features.heading: Keyword Research Tool
features.description: Access the estimated monthly search volume of keywords, measure keyword efficacy, and generate keyword ideas.

features.heading: Listing Optimization Tool
features.description: Monitor daily changes in products' listings to see how changes impact search performance and assess Listing Quality Scores.

features.heading: ASIN Tracker
features.description: Monitor daily changes in the metrics and listing information of any ASIN and leverage insights with a reverse ASIN lookup tool.

features.heading: Sales Rank Tracker
features.description: Track real-time changes in the BSR or sales rank to gauge the sales performance of any product and analyze business dynamics.

features.heading: Product Alerting Tool
features.description: Schedule and receive email alerts related to changes in any product to track and respond to changes in any tracked listings.

features.heading: Product Research Tool
features.description: Conduct extensive product research, understand your position in the market, and explore business dynamics.

features.heading: Best Sellers Rank Tool
features.description: Discover the top 100 selling products for any category, monitor their progress, and analyze their price, ratings, and ratings.

features.heading: Sales Estimates Tool
features.description: Leverage AI-computed metrics to determine any product's estimated maximum and minimum monthly sales.

features.heading: Amazon PPC Tool
features.description: Analyze millions of ad-related data points and generate custom reports with recommendations to optimize your ad campaigns.

features.heading: Amazon Advertising Dashboard
features.description: Connect one or multiple Amazon Ad accounts and examine dashboards with relevant KPIs on account or child ASIN levels.

features.heading: Track Profit and Loss
features.description: Monitor your revenues, costs, and expenses by analyzing a P&L dashboard to determine which actions lead to higher profits.

features.heading: Finance and Sales Dashboard
features.description: Manage finances by measuring your product sales and tracking a historical overview of relevant KPIs in a financial dashboard.
